document.source_title: Donald Trump says he ‘wasn’t involved’ in creation of $1.7bn compensation fund – as it happened

claims.claim_text: Donald Trump said he 'wasn’t involved in' the creation of a so-called anti-weaponization fund.
claims.evidence_text: Trump said he “wasn’t involved in” the creation of a so-called anti-weaponization fund.

claims.claim_text: The fund would be administered by a committee of talented people.
claims.evidence_text: Trump said 'it’ll all be dependent on a committee' of 'very talented people'.

events.event: Donald Trump announced the creation of a $1.7bn compensation fund.
events.evidence_text: Trump moved to dismiss a $10bn lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service and his administration created a $1.776bn 'anti-weaponization' fund.

events.event: Shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego.
events.evidence_text: Police are investigating a deadly shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego as a hate crime, after three people were killed.

citations.title: Donald Trump says he ‘wasn’t involved’ in creation of $1.7bn compensation fund – as it happened

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable news organization providing live updates on significant political events.
